tech_news.description: Google is completely revamping its search experience, and that doesn't stop at YouTube.

tech_news.title: S. 'Soma' Somasegar, 1966-2026: Microsoft and Madrona leader was a champion of developers and startups - GeekWire
tech_news.description: Friends and colleagues remembered S. "Soma" Somasegar, the longtime Microsoft developer leader and Madrona managing director, as a generous mentor to developers and founders, and a fixture of Seattle's tech community.

tech_news.title: Google and Xreal’s ‘Project Aura’ XR Smart Glasses Are Legit - Gizmodo
tech_news.description: The spatial computing experience isn't as immersive as an XR headset, but maybe it doesn't need to be.

tech_news.title: Plex is tripling the price of a lifetime pass to $750 after doubling it last year - The Verge
tech_news.description: Plex is giving every prospective customer until July 1st to lock in a lifetime subscription at today’s rates — before it triples the price to a staggering $750.

tech_news.title: Discord enables end-to-end encrypted voice and video calling for every user - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Good news! Discord's hundreds of millions of users now have their communications scrambled, so not even Discord can see them.

tech_news.title: Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026: Gemini, Search, Smart Glasses - WIRED
tech_news.description: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. There are also some spiffy new smart glasses coming this fall.

tech_news.title: How to use Google’s new information agents - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.
